title: Rich Creamy Argentinian Beef Empanadas
description: Indulgent Argentinian empanadas filled with herbal and creamy beef, featuring palm sugar and Mediterranean-friendly spices, cooked to perfection on a comal
instructions: Preheat the comal over medium heat to 375 degrees Fahrenheit
Combine ground beef, palm sugar, onion, garlic, fried and ground khao khuat rice, egg, oregano, and thyme in a large bowl and mix well
Divide the empanada dough into 8 equal pieces and roll each into a ball
Roll out each ball of dough into a thin circle, about 1/8 inch thick
Place 1/8 cup of the beef mixture in the center of each dough circle
Fold the dough over the filling, forming a half-moon shape, and press the edges together to seal
Brush the tops of the empanadas with olive oil
Place the empanadas on the preheated comal and cook for 5 minutes on each side, or until golden brown
Serve the empanadas hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired
